jd.raw_text: Back to jobs Hardware Engineering US Join Us Hardware Engineering Hardware Engineering develops the electronic and embedded systems that power our technology platforms. From architecture and prototyping to testing and production, this function designs reliable, scalable hardware that performs in demanding real-world environments. Working closely with software, robotics, and operations teams, Hardware Engineers turn concepts into robust systems that enable our products to operate at scale. From food production and delivery to mining and transport, ATOMS develops robotics, software, and infrastructure that automate how things are produced and moved through the physical world. Our systems combine robotics and intelligent software to sense, predict, and act in real-world environments, making earth’s essential industries more productive, reliable, and scalable. Join ATOMS, we build progress machines for the physical world.
